calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT KWAN YIU LEE's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is Off calendar.

Defendant Kwan Yiu Daniel Lee did not serve the motion at least 16 court days before the hearing, plus five days for service by mail, as required. (Code Civ. Proc., 1005(b).) In addition, the Court notes that Defendant's contention that to establish reasonable diligence, "service must be attempted at least three times, during three different times of day, at least three hours apart," is unsupported by any cited authority. "Two or three attempts to personally serve a defendant at a proper place ordinarily qualifies as 'reasonable diligence.'" (Rodriguez v. Cho (2015) 236 Cal.App.4th 742, 750.)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
